content: {"plan": ["Rebuild Patient K's trajectory from her serial draws.", "Compute E2 rate-of-rise, E2 per follicle, OHSS composite, and progesterone-for-day.", "OHSS composite is HIGH -> retrieve the OHSS SOP escalation rule.", "Progesterone is elevated for day 8 -> retrieve the premature-luteinization rule.", "Set next-draw to 24h and draft a cited, escalated brief."]}
